title: Bitcoin Dips Below $62K as Blowout Jobs Data and Zcash Bug Pressure Crypto
summary: Bitcoin fell below $62,000 amid a blowout jobs report and a major bug in Zcash that caused its value to drop by 40%. The bug, undetected for four years, has shaken confidence in the crypto market.
body:
Bitcoin's price dropped below $62,000 on June 5, 2026, pressured by a blowout jobs report and a significant bug in Zcash that caused its value to plummet by 40%.

The bug, revealed by Shielded Labs, had gone undetected for four years. This revelation has raised concerns about the security and reliability of cryptocurrencies, particularly those with complex privacy features.

For everyday investors, this news highlights the risks associated with crypto investments. The sudden drop in Zcash's value serves as a reminder of the potential for significant losses due to unforeseen technical issues.

Investors should closely monitor the situation and consider diversifying their portfolios to mitigate risks. The next few days will be crucial in determining the market's reaction to these developments.
twitterThread: Bitcoin dips below $62K as blowout jobs data and a Zcash bug pressure crypto. Zcash plunged 40% after a 4-year-old flaw was revealed.
Zcash's value dropped 40% after Shielded Labs revealed a major bug that went undetected for 4 years, raising security concerns.
Investors should watch the market closely and consider diversifying. Read more → https://cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-06-05-bitcoin-dips-below-62k-as-zcash-bug-causes-40-plunge
